welcomeMessage: Hi! Welcome to Bright Smile Dental. I can help with appointments, insurance questions, services, or hours. What do you need?

quickPrompts.label: Do you accept my insurance?
quickPrompts.question: Do you accept Delta Dental insurance?

quickPrompts.label: Book a cleaning
quickPrompts.question: I'd like to book a teeth cleaning

responses.insurance|accept|delta|aetna|cigna|cover: We accept most major insurance plans including Delta Dental, Aetna, Cigna, MetLife, and BlueCross. I can verify your specific coverage — what's your provider?
responses.cleaning|checkup|appointment|book|schedu: I can get you scheduled! Dr. Chen has openings this week on Wednesday at 2 PM and Friday at 10 AM. Which works better for you?
responses.emergency|pain|urgent|broken: For dental emergencies, we reserve same-day slots during business hours. Call us directly at (404) 555-0123 for the fastest response. What's the issue?
responses.hours|open|close: We're open Monday through Friday 8 AM to 6 PM, and Saturdays 9 AM to 2 PM. Would you like to book an appointment?
responses.cost|price|how much: A standard cleaning starts at $125 without insurance. Most procedures are partially covered by insurance. Want a specific estimate for something?
responses.new patient|first visit|first time: Welcome! Your first visit includes a comprehensive exam, X-rays, and cleaning — about 90 minutes total. I can email you the new patient forms to fill out ahead of time.
responses.whitening|cosmetic: We offer both in-office whitening ($450) and take-home kits ($250). In-office gives you results in one visit. Interested in scheduling?
responses.location|address|directions|where: We're at 2847 Peachtree Road NE, Suite 200, Atlanta, GA 30305. Free parking in the building garage, entrance on the north side.

fallback: That's a great question! I want to make sure I give you the right answer. Would you like to schedule an appointment, or should I have someone from our team call you back?
